meta.description: Design system extracted from the Antes da Tela Figma file. Source of truth: the three canonical sections (Fluxo principal 186:1388, Fluxo cadastro roteiro 186:1350, Perfil 186:2075). Colors and layout specs confirmed against live Figma globalVars.

colors.note: Hex values confirmed from Figma globalVars fill tokens. HSL approximations for Tailwind CSS vars.

palette.name: state/warning
palette.usage: Warning states (design implied, not yet confirmed in Figma fills)

typography.note: Named styles confirmed from Figma globalVars. Others inferred from existing design-system v3.

screenDimensions.note: All screens confirmed as 1440px wide, fixed sizing

components.name: Button
components.description: Primary, secondary, and ghost CTAs. Size variants SM/MD/LG.

components.name: Tag
components.description: Semantic pill tags for genre, status, rating severity.

components.name: Input
components.description: Standard text input with label, placeholder, error and helper text.

components.name: Input (form)
components.description: Extended input variants used in the upload/publish flow (profile, tagline, description, etc.).

components.name: ScriptCard
components.description: Card for a script in lists. Hover border brand-accent. Shows title, author, genre tag, star rating, page count.

components.name: Header
components.description: Top navigation bar. Contains Logo, nav links, search input, and Avatar/auth actions.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Circular user avatar with image or initials fallback. Used in Header, comments, profile.

components.name: RatingBox
components.description: Star rating + numeric average + total count container. Used in ScriptCard hover and Modal/Roteiro.

components.name: FollowButton
components.description: Follow/Unfollow toggle button for authors. States: default (follow) and following.

components.name: RatingInfo
components.description: Ratings summary shown in Modal/Roteiro: aggregate star breakdown.

components.name: Comment
components.description: Comment item with avatar, author name, timestamp, content, and optional page anchor.

components.name: ReactionBar
components.description: Row of reaction emoji buttons shown in the PDF reader sidebar for page-level reactions.

components.name: Reaction
components.description: Single emoji reaction pill with count. Used inside ReactionBar.

components.name: Player
components.description: Audio player component shown in PDF Reader sidebar. Play/pause, progress, track info.

components.name: Zoom Controller
components.description: Zoom in/out controls for the PDF viewer (+/− buttons + percentage label).

components.name: Page Controller
components.description: Page navigation (◀ N/total ▶) for the PDF viewer.

components.name: Filter Section Header
components.description: Collapsible section header used in the Search Sheet filter panel.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Checkbox with label, used in filter panels and categorization step.

components.name: Checkbox Input
components.description: Checkbox input variant for filter search with inline text input.

components.name: Radio box
components.description: Radio button with label and optional description content.

components.name: Drag
components.description: Drag-and-drop upload zone. Variants for PDF and audio file types.

components.name: Progress
components.description: Step indicator for the multi-step upload wizard. Shows completed/active/pending steps.

components.name: MetricCard
components.description: Dashboard metric tile with title, value, and trend indicator.

components.name: Simple Info
components.description: Compact info row with icon, label and value. Used in Modal/Roteiro sidebar.

components.name: Info
components.description: Info card with title and body content. Two variants: default (with border) and simple.

components.name: CloseButton
components.description: Icon-only close/dismiss button. Used in overlays and modals.

components.name: Logo
components.description: Antes da Tela wordmark / logotype SVG.

usage.spacing: Use the 4px-base scale. Confirmed gaps from Figma: 8px (internal component), 16px (section padding), 28px (nav items), 32px (section gap), 40px (large layout gap).
usage.grid: 12-column grid for desktop layouts, 4 columns for mobile.
usage.sidebar: PDF Reader: ~880px content + ~400px sidebar (desktop) | stacked on mobile.

do: Use brand/accent (#E85C2F) only for primary CTAs and active states — one per context.
Use DM Mono for all numerical metadata, page counts, ratings, and code-like labels.
Use DM Serif Display for headings and display copy.
Use bg/surface (#161616) for the Header and elevated containers.
Use 1px solid #252525 (border/default) for card and input borders.
Minimum 44px touch target for all interactive elements.
Resolve PDF URLs server-side and pass as prop — never call getPublicUrl client-side.
dont: Do not use color values outside the confirmed palette.
Do not use DM Mono in long body paragraphs.
Do not use box-shadow in dark mode — use border tokens instead.
Do not use accent color on multiple sibling elements.
Do not use .select('*') across the RSC boundary — select only columns the client renders.

componentAudit.name: Button
componentAudit.notes: Primary implemented. Ghost and destructive variants missing. Need size tokens (sm/md/lg) and icon slot.

componentAudit.name: Tag
componentAudit.notes: Core variants (default, error, warning) exist. Genre and status-specific variants (drama, thriller, publicado, rascunho) need adding.

componentAudit.name: Input
componentAudit.notes: Base input exists. Needs helperText support, error state UI, and focus ring using brand/accent token.

componentAudit.name: Header
componentAudit.notes: Implemented as components/navbar.tsx. Missing: active link highlighting, search input integration, mobile collapse. figmaNodeId corrected to 50:1747 (was 13:137).

componentAudit.name: ScriptCard
componentAudit.notes: Implemented at components/ui/script-card.tsx. figmaNodeId corrected to 48:644 (was 3:51). Cover image still missing — requires script.cover_url data.

componentAudit.name: Modal/Roteiro (ScriptPreviewModal)
componentAudit.notes: Implemented at components/script-preview-modal/. Deferred: cover thumbnail, audio Player component, full RatingInfo breakdown, FollowButton.

componentAudit.name: Avatar
componentAudit.notes: Inline initials fallback in comments-sidebar.tsx. Needs extraction to standalone Avatar component before profile page work.

componentAudit.name: FollowButton
componentAudit.notes: NEW — not implemented. Used on Home (author cards), Modal/Roteiro, and Perfil-Usuario. Toggle between follow/following states.

componentAudit.name: RatingBox
componentAudit.notes: Inline in script-card.tsx. Should be a reusable RatingBox component wrapping StarRating + numeric average.

componentAudit.name: RatingInfo
componentAudit.notes: NEW — not implemented. Ratings breakdown panel used in Modal/Roteiro.

componentAudit.name: Comment
componentAudit.notes: Exists in PDF reader sidebar. Needs avatar, page-anchor label, and reply nesting.

componentAudit.name: ReactionBar
componentAudit.notes: NOT implemented. Required for PDF reader sidebar UX.

componentAudit.name: Reaction
componentAudit.notes: NEW — single emoji reaction pill. Child of ReactionBar.

componentAudit.name: Player
componentAudit.notes: NEW — audio player in PDF Reader sidebar. Needs play/pause, progress bar, track info.

componentAudit.name: Zoom Controller
componentAudit.notes: Inline in pdf-viewer.tsx. Consider extracting to standalone component.

componentAudit.name: Page Controller
componentAudit.notes: Inline in pdf-viewer.tsx alongside ZoomController.

componentAudit.name: Progress
componentAudit.notes: Upload wizard step indicator. Needed before /publish flow implementation.

componentAudit.name: Drag
componentAudit.notes: DragZone exists. Needs PDF and audio variants per Figma (file vs audio types).

componentAudit.name: MetricCard
componentAudit.notes: Required for Dashboard-Autor screen. Positive/negative/neutral variants with trend indicator.

componentAudit.name: Filter Section Header
componentAudit.notes: Collapsible header used in Search Sheet filter panel.

componentAudit.name: Checkbox
componentAudit.notes: shadcn Checkbox installed. Needs wrapping with label for filter use.

componentAudit.name: Radio box
componentAudit.notes: Used in Categorização step of upload flow.

screens.name: Home
screens.notes: Basic listing implemented. Missing: FollowButton on author cards, search input in Header, RatingBox as standalone component.

screens.name: PDF Reader
screens.notes: PDFViewer implemented. Missing: Player, ReactionBar, Reaction components. Comments sidebar partially done.

screens.name: Upload / Informações Básicas
screens.notes: Basic form exists. Missing: Progress step indicator, correct Input (form) variants.

screens.name: Upload / Arquivos
screens.notes: DragZone exists but audio variant missing.
